creator: pgollucci@riderway.com
text:
I think its perfectly reasonably to OPTIONALLY depend on apache.
I.E. PHP there is a cli

I agree it doesn't need it, but If I happen to use Apache for the CGI
It would nice for portupgrade. Or if I do a pkg_add -r awstats-devel on 
a __CUSTOM__ built package with this DEFINE which is OFF by default to 
pull in the package.

For p5-URI, I'm fine with making it an option for Geo-IP and I agree 
with your findings on that.
